deadlineNote: Reg (EU) 2024/1183 obliges Member States to make at least one EUDI Wallet available within 24 months of the first implementing acts entering into force on 24 December 2024, placing the deadline at 24 December 2026.

countries.name: Austria
countries.notes: Existing ID Austria platform with mobile eAusweise. Upgrade to EUDI Wallet officially confirmed. Among the strong second tier per Namirial Q1 2026 review.

sources.title: Biometric Update - Austria adds digital student ID to eAusweise

countries.name: Belgium
countries.notes: BOSA presented MyGov.be as Belgium's response to the eIDAS 2.0 wallet obligation. itsme continues to be widely used for daily authentication and is expected to plug into the EUDI ecosystem.

sources.title: BOSA - MyGov.be available as digital key

countries.name: Bulgaria
countries.notes: Draft Law on the European Digital Identity Wallet published for consultation in February 2026. Public developer repository available but no sandbox. Namirial flags Bulgaria as remaining risky for the December 2026 deadline.

sources.title: BTA - Bulgaria moves to introduce European Digital Identity Wallet
Bulgaria Public Consultation Portal - Draft EUDI Wallet law

igrantActivity.summary: iGrant.io contributes to the WE BUILD Large Scale Pilot, in which Bulgaria participates. Past EUDI Wallet involvement includes EWC, EBSI, EBSI VECTOR and CRANE PCP (healthcare).

countries.name: Croatia
countries.notes: The Certilia Wallet is being upgraded for EUDI Wallet capabilities.

sources.title: Biometric Update - Croatian digitalization head shares concerns
Signicat - EUDI Wallets: only one year to launch
Identity Week 18 months to launch overview

countries.name: Cyprus
countries.walletProvider: Deputy Ministry of Research, Innovation and Digital Policy
countries.notes: The Digital Citizen platform is aligning to the Greek Gov.gr Wallet for mutual recognition.

sources.title: Signicat - EUDI Wallets one year to launch

countries.name: Czechia
countries.notes: DIA-led announced project, no public sandbox. Namirial Q1 2026 places Czechia in the middle band, no longer a laggard.

sources.title: Biometric Update - Czechia's EUDI Wallet to go live in early 2027

countries.name: Denmark
countries.notes: Public sandbox available since April 2026. AltID has released both Age Verification and Identity Verification, though it does not yet offer full EUDI Wallet functionality.

sources.title: Biometric Update - Denmark launches AltID for proof of age and identity
Biometric Update - AltID to provide ID and age verification with ZKPs
Danish Agency for Digital Government - AltID

countries.name: Estonia
countries.notes: Announced project, no public sandbox. Estonia already runs Smart-ID and Mobile-ID at very high adoption; EUDI work is being built on top of that estate.

sources.title: Biometric Update - Estonia launches EUR 21.65m procurement for EUDI Wallet
Identity Week 18 months to launch overview

countries.name: Finland
countries.walletProvider: Digital and Population Data Services Agency (DVV)
countries.notes: Public developer repository linked to DVV's wallet work, no confirmed sandbox.

countries.name: France
countries.notes: France Identité is a live production service expanding its functionality and ecosystem integration as it becomes an official EUDI Wallet. Public playground for relying parties. Significant development is also underway through UNFOLD interoperathon events.

countries.name: Germany
countries.notes: Announced project with public sandbox. State-driven version scheduled to launch on 2 January 2027, then opening the market to private wallet providers in 2028. Sandbox and prototype challenge in progress.

countries.name: Greece
countries.notes: Gov.gr Wallet is in closed pilot. Upgrade to EUDI Wallet officially confirmed; details on production scope still limited.

countries.name: Hungary
countries.notes: DÁP (Digitális Állampolgárság Program) wallet deployed at national level. EUDI upgrade not yet officially confirmed per eIDEasy.

countries.name: Ireland
countries.walletProvider: Department of the Environment, Climate and Communications
countries.notes: Ireland opened early public access to a test wallet in April 2026, joining France and Germany as one of the most accessible ecosystems.

sources.title: Gov.ie - Government Digital Wallet questions answered

countries.name: Italy
countries.notes: Italy's IT-Wallet system pairs the public IO app with accredited private wallets, with citizens activating via CIE or SPID. SPID has 41.5 million registered users, making Italy one of the most operationally advanced EUDI transition cases in Europe.

sources.title: Innovazione.gov.it - IT-Wallet three digital documents available
Dipartimento per la trasformazione digitale - Sistema IT-Wallet

countries.name: Latvia
countries.notes: Latvia developed an EUDIW prototype used in the Large Scale Pilots. Initial release with basic functionality planned for December 2026.

sources.title: Signicat - EUDI Wallets one year to launch

countries.name: Lithuania
countries.walletProvider: Informatics and Communications Department, Ministry of the Interior
countries.notes: Announced project, no public sandbox.

countries.name: Luxembourg
countries.notes: Existing GouvID app being upgraded. INCERT partnering with HOPAE on wallet services.

countries.name: Malta
countries.notes: Announced project, no public sandbox. Identity Week and Namirial note Malta is expected to deliver only partial availability by deadline.

sources.title: Sumsub - Malta to launch digital wallet by EUDI 2026

countries.name: Moldova
countries.notes: Closed pilot with the EVO Wallet. The sandbox is closed; access requires onboarding through Moldova's national trust scheme.

sources.title: Radio Moldova - Moldova's path toward the EUDI Wallet
Paradym - Moldova's pragmatic path toward the EUDI Wallet

countries.name: Netherlands
countries.walletProvider: Ministry of the Interior and Kingdom Relations
countries.notes: 57 residents of the Municipality of Amsterdam and the Municipality of Nijmegen tested the first version of the NL Wallet. The Dutch Government has publicly stated the initial release will not meet the full requirement set on time.

sources.title: Biometric Update - Dutch test demonstrates integration
EDI Pleio - Eerste ervaringen met de NL Wallet
Signicat - EUDI Wallets one year to launch

countries.name: Poland
countries.notes: mObywatel runs in production with nearly 10 million users on version 2.0. Public commitment to integrate EUDI Wallet capabilities into mObywatel by end of 2026; transition to version 3.0 carries some delivery risk.

countries.name: Portugal
countries.notes: The gov.pt app is expecting an upgrade for EUDI Wallet capabilities.

sources.title: Signicat - EUDI Wallets one year to launch

countries.name: Romania
countries.walletProvider: Authority for the Digitalization of Romania (ADR)
countries.notes: Romania has formally adopted Germany's open-source EUDI Wallet solution. First phase (mobile app, PID issuance, age verification) planned for 2026. Implementation led by MEDAT, MAI, and STS.

sources.title: Sumsub - Romania signs Mastercard deal to develop EUDI Wallet
Digi24 - Romania will use German solution for EUDI Wallet

countries.name: Slovakia
countries.notes: eDOKLADY in production with a published timeline. EUDIW offline verification scheduled for Q2 2026 per the Slovak Ministry of Interior.

sources.title: Ministry of Interior Slovakia - eDOKLADY timeline

countries.name: Slovenia
countries.notes: Announced project, no public sandbox. SI-PASS to provide the trust anchor for the wallet.

sources.title: Government of Slovenia - SI-PASS and eID

countries.name: Spain
countries.walletProvider: Ministry for Digital Transformation and Civil Service
countries.notes: First wallet version leveraging Cl@ve presented at the EUDI Wallet Launchpad in December 2025. Cl@ve has over 24 million registered users and 1.1 billion annual authentications.

sources.title: Digital EU - Spanish National Wallet at EUDI Launchpad 2025

countries.name: Sweden
countries.notes: Announced project, no public sandbox. Namirial places Sweden in the second tier on the strength of public mandate, sandbox work and implementation structure.

sources.title: Biometric Update - Sweden to launch government eID in December 2026

countries.name: Norway
countries.notes: Public sandbox available for the Digital lommebok. As an EEA country, Norway has an extra year for adoption (December 2027).

countries.name: Iceland
countries.notes: Launch announced for 2026 with Idemia as technology partner, one year before Iceland's EEA deadline of December 2027.

sources.title: FIDES Community - National EUDI Wallet Iceland

countries.name: Liechtenstein
countries.notes: Existing eID.li app supports identity, driving licence, QES and cross-border commuter registration. Planned for EUDI Wallet adaptation; EEA deadline is December 2027.

countries.name: United Kingdom
countries.notes: UK is outside the EUDI mandate but tracking interoperability and laying the groundwork for future alignment. GOV.UK Wallet under build alongside One Login. Digital Veteran Card went live in 2025; private testing of digital driving licence under way.

sources.title: GDS Blog - Making the government's first digital wallet a reality
Making public services work for you with your digital identity (UK Gov paper)

countries.name: Switzerland
countries.notes: Public beta of swiyu infrastructure ahead of many EU countries on openness. National e-ID launch expected on 1 December 2026 following the September 2025 referendum.

countries.name: Albania
countries.notes: Albania is outside the EU but pursuing EU alignment. Announced plans to introduce a national digital ID in 2026.

sources.title: ID Tech Wire - Albania announces 2026 launch for national digital ID

countries.name: Bosnia and Herzegovina
countries.walletProvider: Agency for Identification Documents Registry and Data Exchange (IDDEEA)
countries.notes: Bosnia and Herzegovina is outside the EU but participating in the WE BUILD Large Scale Pilot. National digital ID app launched in 2025.

sources.title: Biometric Update - Bosnia and Herzegovina launches national digital ID app
Identyum - Digital ID wallet soon available to citizens of Bosnia and Herzegovina

countries.name: Georgia
countries.notes: Georgia is outside the EU but pursuing EU alignment. Tender launched in early 2025 seeking candidates to build a national digital ID wallet.

sources.title: Biometric Update - Georgia seeks candidates to build digital ID wallet

countries.name: Ukraine
countries.walletProvider: Ministry of Digital Transformation of Ukraine
countries.notes: Ukraine is outside the EU but participating in the APTITUDE Large Scale Pilot. Diia app being upgraded to EUDI Wallet standards.

sources.title: EU for Digital - Ukraine helping to develop the European Digital Identity Wallet
ID Tech Wire - Ukraine adopts EU-compatible digital ID wallet framework
